name: oh-story-skills
description: Codex-native Chinese web novel writing toolbox for scanning, analysis, drafting, review, de-AI polishing, import, cover generation, and browser-assisted workflows.

interface.longDescription: A Chinese web novel workflow plugin for Codex, covering market scanning, story deconstruction, long-form and short-form writing, review, de-AI polishing, import, cover generation, and browser-assisted data collection.
